title: Melty Roasted Mediterranean Banana Pudding
description: A light and gooey Mediterranean dessert featuring roasted bananas and puff pastry, served in individual ramekins.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Peel the bananas and slice them into 1-inch pieces.
Roll out the puff pastry and cut it into 4 equal squares.
In a small bowl, mix together the honey, lemon zest, and cinnamon.
Brush the melted butter onto the pastry squares, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Spoon the banana pieces onto one half of each pastry square.
Drizzle the honey mixture over the bananas.
Fold the other half of the pastry square over the bananas to form a triangle.
Brush the tops of the pastry with the remaining melted butter.
Sprinkle the chopped pine nuts over the tops of the pastry.
Place the pastry triangles in individual ramekins and bake for 20 minutes.
